name: Fascinate
descrip: Cast a charm on your opponent.
outcome: [AttackerName] makes a heart with [AttackerHisOrHer] fingers and fires a beam of pink magic at [TargetName], sending a blissful warm and pleasurable sensation through where it strikes!
miss: [AttackerName] makes a heart with [AttackerHisOrHer] fingers and fires a beam of pink magic at [TargetName], but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to dodge it!
statusOutcome: The spell weaves around [TargetName]'s thoughts, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] helplessly charmed with [AttackerName]!
